field_values.action_summary: The group is lodged in the palace. They are informed that they may see the Wizard, but he will only grant their wishes if they first kill the Wicked Witch of the West.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of the group discussing news; Reaction shots to green_girl delivery
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Prop consistency for lodging items and food
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH011_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the high-stakes ultimatum provided by the Wizard's messenger within the palace setting. The group transitions from the comfort of their lodging to the realization of a lethal requirement for their desires.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- green_girl

## Required Environments
- palace_guest_quarters (including guest_seating_area and hallway_threshold)

## Continuity Constraints
- Prop consistency for lodging items and food
- Character positioning within palace_guest_quarters
- Green attire for green_girl/citizens

## Beat List
- BT001: Group resting in palace quarters.
- BT002: green_girl delivers the Wizard's message (kill the Wicked Witch).
- BT003: The impossible demand is processed by the group.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
